# Project Reference - styling-scss

> **IMPORTANT:** These are summaries. READ the full doc file when working in the matching context.

## [SCSS Styling Guide](../../docs/project-reference/scss-styling-guide.md)

**Summary:** BEM + token-driven SCSS rules — `block__element--modifier` naming (with the project's standalone `--modifier` class variant bound via `[class.--modifier]`), two-tier platform-core/`$app-*` tokens, `@use`/`@forward` (never `@import`), `flex-layout-media()` responsive mixin (never raw `@media`), mixins/functions reference, color palette, and theming. NEVER hardcode colors, pixels, font sizes, or z-index.

> **READ** `docs/project-reference/scss-styling-guide.md` when: Writing or editing any `.scss`/`.css` — applying BEM classes, using design tokens, responsive layout, or theming.
